description_long: This is a large, two-story residential house with a mix of brick and white exterior walls, featuring a prominent front entrance with double doors and symmetrical window placement. The structure includes a two-car garage on one side, a covered porch on the opposite end, and a bay window section at the rear. The roof is primarily flat with a central open terrace area, accessible by an exterior staircase. Multiple large windows and French doors provide ample natural light, while the landscaping includes several trees and bushes around the perimeter. The architectural style blends Colonial and modern elements, with clean lines and traditional window arrangements.
description: A spacious two-story house with brick and white walls, flat roof, garage, covered porch, and symmetrical windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double doors, brick facade, and two-car garage on the left.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the open terrace, exterior staircase, and multiple windows.
description_view_2: Rear view with a bay window, large French doors, covered porch, and visible landscaping.
description_view_3: Side view with the covered porch, trees, and symmetrical window arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with bay window and large French doors
attribute_entryway_design: Double front doors with steps, brick surround, and a modest overhang
